name: MealForge
description: MealForge helps fitness coaches create personalized, macro-balanced meal plans for every client in seconds — not hours. Enter goals, allergies, and preferences. Get a branded weekly plan. Share in one click.

hero.title: Client meal plans in 30 seconds, not
hero.subtitle: Enter your client's goals, allergies, and preferences. Get a branded, macro-balanced weekly plan. Share it in one click. Stop losing Sundays to spreadsheets.
hero.cta: Join the Waitlist — Free Early Access

beforeAfter.before: Sunday night: 3 hours of Googling recipes and calculating macros for 8 clients. You skip meal plans entirely because there's no time — and your clients notice.
beforeAfter.after: All 8 clients have personalized meal plans before your morning coffee. Each plan is branded, macro-balanced, and comes with a grocery list. You charge $100 more per client.

problems.title: 45 minutes per client, per plan
problems.desc: Googling recipes, calculating macros, formatting spreadsheets. Multiply by 15 clients and your entire weekend is gone.

problems.title: Leaving $100/client on the table
problems.desc: Coaches who offer meal plans charge $50–100 more per month. But you can't offer what you don't have time to create.

problems.title: Generic plans kill client trust
problems.desc: Copy-pasting the same plan for every client? They notice. Personalization is what keeps clients paying month after month.

features.title: 30-Second Plan Generation
features.desc: Enter client goals, dietary restrictions, and food preferences. Get a complete 7-day meal plan with calories and macros calculated automatically.

features.title: Your Brand, Your Plans
features.desc: Add your logo, colors, and coaching name. Every plan looks like you spent hours on it. Share as polished PDFs or client-friendly links.

features.title: Smart Grocery Lists
features.desc: Each plan comes with a consolidated shopping list. Your clients stop asking 'what should I buy?' and start actually following the plan.

cta.title: Stop spending hours on meal plans. Start spending seconds.
cta.subtitle: Join the waitlist today. Founding coaches get lifetime pricing and free early access.

seo.title: MealForge — AI Meal Plans for Fitness Coaches | 30 Seconds Per Client
seo.description: MealForge helps fitness coaches create personalized, macro-balanced meal plans in 30 seconds. Custom branding, grocery lists, and PDF export. Free to start.
